postLog.postText: Quick question for dental practice owners ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВѓГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” how many new patient calls are you missing after 5pm and on weekends? Most practices I've talked to are losing new patient calls during their busiest hours ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВѓГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” not after hours. We've been setting up an AI receptionist that handles overflow calls during peak hours and picks up everything after close. Sounds completely human, books patients on the calendar, handles new patient FAQs.

Curious how other office managers are handling call volume right now ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВѓГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” what's your system?

PI attorneys ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” genuine question. What's your after-hours intake process right now?

Rental operators ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” quick question. When someone calls at 11pm trying to book a car for tomorrow morning, what happens on your end?

Most private rental operators I talk to say the same thing: the call goes to voicemail, and by the time they call back in the morning the customer already found someone else or booked on Turo.

postLog.group: Real Estate Talks - Property Buyers | Owners | Agents
postLog.postText:
Question for property owners and agents here вЂ” what's your process when a buyer or tenant calls after 6pm?

Most of the time it goes to voicemail. And in a competitive market, that's often enough for them to move on to the next listing or the next agent.

I've been setting up an AI receptionist for real estate professionals that handles those after-hours calls вЂ” answers questions about the property, captures buyer or tenant info, schedules showings directly on the calendar. Sounds like a real person on your team. Not a bot, not an overseas call center.

If you're curious what it sounds like, call it and ask about a listing: +1 (325) 240-6238

Happy to share more if anyone here finds it useful. What's your current setup for after-hours inquiries?
